pre_game.message: Hey D, I'm B – excited to be here for this Simco game, it sounds like a fun challenge. What's your story, how'd you end up joining in?

Hey B, nice to meet you—I'm D, and I got wind of this Simco game as a way to win some cash and help out the folks I care about, so I jumped at the chance. What about you, what's your take on the game so far?
Hey D, I'm stoked about the Simco game too—it's a cool opportunity to win some money and help out my family, though I haven't seen it in action yet; what's your strategy for playing?
Hey B, I'm planning to start cautious, maybe build some trust with others before making big moves—gotta play smart to maximize our chances; what's your strategy looking like?
Hey D, I'm thinking of playing it safe at first too, like forming some alliances and watching how things unfold—sounds like we're on the same page; how do you think building trust will play out here?

Hey B, I figure building trust could lead to some strong alliances that help us early on, but it'll be tough if folks get greedy—gotta stay vigilant; how do you plan to approach spotting reliable partners?

Hey D, I plan to spot reliable partners by watching how folks handle conversations—look for those who keep their word and don't flip-flop too much; it'll be key in building those alliances. What signs are you keeping an eye out for?

Hey B, I'm watching for folks who stay consistent in their stories and show genuine interest in teaming up without pushing too hard—consistency and sincerity are big for me; what's your top tip for spotting that?
Hey D, my top tip is to watch for people who back up their words with actions, even in small ways during chats—it really shows their true colors; how do you plan to test that in the game?
Hey B, I plan to test that by proposing simple joint moves early on, like agreeing on a minor strategy and checking if people follow through—it'll give me a good read on their reliability.
Hey D, that sounds like a smart way to test things—I'm all for starting small to build real trust; let's see how it plays out. Good chatting with you!
